urdu transliteration text:
Jawaan ki hai mayyat yun dilse lagaale abhi,
Yeh kon aaraha hai yun thokare khaake abhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Hold the dead body of the youth against your heart, Who is that coming while stumbling?

urdu transliteration text:
Jawani me marne ki hasrat hai kiski
Zaifi me kaandhon pe mayyat hai kiski
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Whose wish is it to die during their youth?Whose dead body is on his shouldersduring old age?

urdu transliteration text:
Khuda dushmano ko yeh gham na dikhaye kabhi
Zaifi me ye gham koi dil na paaye kabhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: May Allah not give this sadness even to the enemies, May no heart receive this sadnessin old age

urdu transliteration text:
Dua maa yeh kartiti thi zindaan raho tum
Phalo phoolo aabad shad raho tum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: His mother would pray, "May you remain alive”May you remain prosperous

urdu transliteration text:
Yahaan maa dua me musalla bichaye abhi
Waha laash bete ki khaime me aaye abhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Here, the mother spreads out her prayer mat for du’a. There, her son's body arrives into the tent

urdu transliteration text:
Jo bete ka dekha, phata huwa sina
Pukaari ye Maa bas huwa khak jina
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When she saw her son's open chestThe mother cried, "My life has come to an end"

urdu transliteration text:
Jiyungi me ab, kaise yeh daagh uthaye abhi
Khuda mujhko dunya se jald uthaale abhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: "How can I live with such a great sorrow?”"May Allah take me from the world right now"

urdu transliteration text:
Bahan ko ye mola ki awaaz aayi
Andhera hai aankho me majboor bhai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The sister heard her brother say"There is darkness in my eyes"

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh laasha uthaaye ya dil ko sambhale abhi
Zara bache bhejo ke mayyat uthaale abhi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Should I lift up this dead body or take care of my heart? Send the children to help me carry the dead body
